summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ERP system including backend APIs, frontend UI flows, user registration/login, dashboard functionality, and core module navigation. All major features are working correctly with demo data automatically seeded.

design_issues.issue: JWT tokens appear to have short expiration time causing frequent logouts during testing
